title: lastrea arguta
intro: Lastrea arguta, also known as the Sensitive Fern or Lady Fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the fern family (Dryopteridaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Lastrea arguta include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce fever, and calm digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
